BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-MTFit
BundleInfo.Author: Bui Lab @ McGill
BundleInfo.Synopsis: Microtubule curve fitting for cryo-ET template matching data
BundleInfo.Description: Fits polynomial curves to microtubule positions from 3D template matching STAR files. Runs a 4-step pipeline inside ChimeraX: 1. Fit - seed-and-grow curve fitting 2. Clean - remove duplicate/overlapping tubes 3. Connect - join broken tube segments by trajectory extrapolation 4. Predict - assign initial angles from template matching data

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: ChimeraX :: Command :: mtfit :: General :: Fit microtubule curves on template matching particle list
ChimeraX :: Command :: mtfit setpath :: General :: Set the CryoET_MTFit project directory path
ChimeraX :: Tool :: MTFit :: General :: Microtubule curve fitting panel
